overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a soldier walking through a rural tropical village called Puerto Chico. The character moves along a muddy dirt road past wooden shacks, a watchtower, corrugated metal buildings, and a prominent red brick building under partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with watchtower and welcome sign

events.description: approaching the wooden watchtower structure on the right side of the dirt road

agents.ego_description: soldier walking steadily down the dirt road entering Puerto Chico village

entered.detail: white rectangular sign with black text reading PUERTO CHICO mounted on wooden posts
muddy brown dirt path with tire tracks and puddles
multi-level wooden watchtower with external staircase and observation deck
utility poles with horizontal wires stretching across the scene
rustic wooden plank fencing along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village of Puerto Chico, passing a sign on the right. The dirt road stretches ahead through dense tropical vegetation, with a wooden watchtower visible in the distance on the right. Power lines run parallel to the road under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with wooden shacks and corrugated metal buildings

events.description: red van becomes visible parked on the right side of the road ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the village center past wooden shacks on the left and metal buildings on the right

entered.detail: small building with rusted corrugated metal walls and sloped roof
weathered wooden hut with dark brown planks
tall wooden utility pole with overhead lamp
industrial yellow equipment container sitting beside the metal building
old red van parked on the right shoulder of the dirt road

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the village, the character passes between wooden shacks on the left and corrugated metal buildings on the right. The watchtower recedes behind as the road curves slightly. A red van appears parked ahead among the tropical vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with red brick building and basketball court

events.description: approaching fenced basketball court and two-story red brick building
passing sandbag barricades stacked near the red brick building

agents.ego_description: walking past the red van and through the village center toward the red brick building

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing walking along the left side of the road
armed guard standing near the sandbag barricade by the red building

entered.detail: chain-link fence surrounding a concrete basketball court with hoop visible
two-story red brick structure with white balcony railings and multiple windows
stacked sandbags forming a defensive position near the building entrance
metal frame gateway leading to the basketball court area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent red brick building with a fenced basketball court on the right. The red van is passed closely on the right, and sandbag barricades appear near the building. Villagers walk along the road, and the village architecture becomes more densely packed with the two-story brick structure dominating the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the outskirts of Puerto Chico into the densely packed heart of the tropical village. It begins by passing a village sign on a dirt road flanked by thick vegetation, with a wooden watchtower standing in the distance under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera moves deeper into the settlement, the open greenery gives way to a corridor of wooden shacks and corrugated metal buildings while the watchtower recedes behind. The scene then shifts toward a more developed area, passing a parked red van and approaching a fenced basketball court. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a prominent two-story red brick building guarded by sandbag barricades, with villagers walking along the road as the architecture becomes increasingly crowded.
